# Duke MIDS Student Resources

:::{admonition} Looking for information about the Duke MIDS program?
:class: important

If you are a prospective student or are looking for general information about the Duke Master in Interdisciplinary Data Science program, please visit **[datascience.duke.edu](https://datascience.duke.edu)**.

This site contains supplemental resources for **current MIDS students** only.
:::

---

Data science is an intrinsically applied field — but graduate programs often focus on methods and theory while leaving students to discover on their own the practical skills, professional habits, and career wisdom that make a real difference. This site collects that hard-won knowledge in one place.

These resources are curated for students in the **[Duke Master in Interdisciplinary Data Science (MIDS)](https://datascience.duke.edu/academics/masters-program)** program, drawing on years of teaching, advising, and mentoring MIDS students through their degrees and into their careers.

---
